chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 1101 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.6577/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For orders on MA No.6578/2025 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of protective bail 13.11.2025 Mr. Shafique Ahmed Khan, Advocate along with applicant / accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Office objection for the time being is overruled on account of the bail application being concluded through this order. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Applicant / accused Muhammad Hussain alias Muhammad Hassan S/o Hadi Bux Jaffri seeks protective bail in Crime No.29/2025, registered at Police Station Rohri, District Sukkur, under Sections 148, 149, 114, 302, PPC. It is, inter alia, contended that applicant / accused is prepared to surrender before the trial Court, but apprehends his arrest as NBW has been issued against him. Without touching merits of the case, protective bail is granted to the applicant / accused for a period of five days, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of the NBW shall stand suspended for the period of five days. Applicant / accused shall surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have any effect after expiry of five days or when the applicant / accused surrenders before the trial court, whichever occurs earlier. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms.

This order shall cease to have any effect after expiry of five days or when the applicant / accused surrenders before the trial court, whichever occurs earlier. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
